data.content: Validated cross-browser terminal rehydration. Added a unit regression test for useRehydrateTerminals always calling listSessions() with an empty local store, plus a dev-only terminal fixture route and Playwright smoke script that proves a fresh browser instance rehydrates active backend sessions, shows live running/completed state, and can terminate a session from the new instance. Repo gates passed: bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, and bun run lint with the existing unrelated warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx. Smoke validation passed via scripts/test-terminal-rehydration-multicontext.sh.
